sent_simp: 餐厅贴出告示，要求杜绝浪费食物的行为。
sent_trad: 餐廳貼出告示，要求杜絕浪費食物的行為。
pinyin: Cāntīng tiē chū gàoshi, yāoqiú dùjué làngfèi shíwù de xíngwéi.
english: The restaurant posted a notice demanding that food waste be completely eliminated.

sent_simp: 爷爷腿不方便，出门要坐轮椅。
sent_trad: 爺爺腿不方便，出門要坐輪椅。
pinyin: Yéye tuǐ bù fāngbiàn, chūmén yào zuò lúnyǐ.
english: Grandpa has trouble with his legs and needs a wheelchair when going out.
